prose: Water frontier-orbital gap calculated using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied water.xyz, used as-is in a single-point calculation. SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO energy = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO energy = +0.33695037 eV, yielding a HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap) of 8.9406687 eV. Total electronic energy = −76.462901 Hartree. Integrity check passed; all validation checks successful. Command: chemkit frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz.
